compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect onboarding config parameter coverage
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing documentation (CLAUDE.md, project-understanding.md, or other existing docs) to reflect the expanded onboarding config parameter coverage — new CI keys, version.file_path disambiguation, merge.ci_workflow_name deprecation, and key name corrections.
**Why**: After this epic, onboarding generates additional config keys and has new UX flows that existing docs do not describe.
**Scope**:
- IN: Updates to CLAUDE.md architecture section if onboarding config coverage is referenced; updates to any existing docs that mention project-setup config generation
- OUT: Creating new documentation files; changes to SKILL.md (handled by stories 1-4)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, existing project documentation accurately describes the onboarding config parameter coverage including CI keys, version.file_path, stack, and the deprecation migration path
  ← Satisfies: "Documentation accuracy after epic completion"

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting and conventions

comments.body: Fixed: Documentation updated to reflect expanded config coverage
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
